name: Essence of Finality amulet
hoverSummary: High-end amulet that stores a special attack and combines Reaper necklace and Amulet of souls effects.
detailLines: Examine: An amulet fused with the power of a reaper necklace and amulet of souls. Stores a special attack which can then be harnessed as an ability.
Combines the effects of Reaper necklace and Amulet of souls.
Stores a special attack which can be used as an ability.
implementationNotes: Sample amulet-slot item for gear builder MVP.
